introSection: Wild Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster owned by UK fairground operator Danter Attractions.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In 2006, the sign for this ride was replaced with one that has bolder letters.

In 2009, the trains were repainted with mouses on each corner of the train, with different colour schemes.

In 2013, the ride was repainted dark purple with yellow supports. Previously it had light blue track and yellow supports.

In May 2015, the ride operated at Barry Island Pleasure Park. From July 15, 2017 to September 3, it operated at Funland at The Tropicana in Weston-super-Mare. During Christmas 2017, it operated in Birmingham.

In 2018, the trains were repainted to purple, yellow and green.

In 2024, the cars were repainted again with each car having a different color scheme and had the words ‘’WILD MOUSE’’ painted in the back of the trains.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is the more compact Spinning Coaster from Reverchon.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster owned by UK fairground operator Danter Attractions.

In 2006, the sign for this ride was replaced with one that has bolder letters.

In 2009, the trains were repainted with mouses on each corner of the train, with different colour schemes.

In 2013, the ride was repainted dark purple with yellow supports. Previously it had light blue track and yellow supports.

In May 2015, the ride operated at Barry Island Pleasure Park. From July 15, 2017 to September 3, it operated at Funland at The Tropicana in Weston-super-Mare. During Christmas 2017, it operated in Birmingham.

In 2018, the trains were repainted to purple, yellow and green.

In 2024, the cars were repainted again with each car having a different color scheme and had the words ‘’WILD MOUSE’’ painted in the back of the trains.

This is the more compact Spinning Coaster from Reverchon.




 * Official webpage
